title: Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad
tagline: Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sathya Vageeswarar Temple in Kalakkad, a village in Tirunelveli district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva.
overview.description: Sathya Vageeswarar Temple in Kalakkad, a village in Tirunelveli district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva. This Temple is Centered on Kalakad Town, It is located 45 km from Tirunelveli. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple has three precincts. Shiva is worshipped as Sathya Vageeswarar and his consort Parvathi as Gomathi.

topPlaces.name: Singampathu
topPlaces.description: Singampathu is a small Indian village located at latitude 8.52°N 77.558°E / 8.52; 77.558 It is just less than 1 kilometre (0.62 mi) away from the main town of Kalakkad. This village has historical significance, because people from this village fought against caste issues that are prevalent in this area.

topPlaces.description: Kalakad is a Town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kalakad is one of the 3 Municipalities of Tirunelveli District, and is one of the fastest-growing towns in the district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad?
faq.a: Stays in Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sathya Vageeswarar Temple, Kalakkad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Singampathu, Kalakkad, Kulashekharanatha Mahalingam Temple, Pathai, Pillaimadam, Thirukkurungudi.
